title: Review spec-791d01a3 implementation
description: Review the complete change set for spec-791d01a3: the spec.py edit, the new test, and the documentation updates. Verify correctness, consistency with project conventions, and that the acceptance criteria in the spec are fully satisfied.
acceptance_criteria: Diff in spec.py is limited to removing _require_lifecycle_dirs() and adding the makedirs loop inside cmd_create
New test is housed in TestCmdCreate and follows the _TempDirTest / _init_specs pattern used elsewhere in the suite
SKILL.md and README.md changes are accurate and don't introduce contradictions
All acceptance criteria from spec-791d01a3 are demonstrably met
No unintended side-effects on other callers of _require_lifecycle_dirs
